description: Stacking ensemble that generates out-of-fold predictions for base learners, trains a meta‑learner on those predictions, and blends meta and base probabilities.
known_pitfalls: CatBoost and LightGBM require GPU-enabled builds; either learner retries on CPU if its CUDA backend is unavailable.
The logistic-regression base and meta learners always run on CPU.
